name: Two Time
description:
"Man, Azure would be proud of me..."

Another sloppy bot made at 1 AM! Yipeee! Anyways, here's a bot of an absolutely caked up Two Time. You can find the art here.

The bot is set on the lobby's cabin, but reimagined as it if were a camping cabin, those with multiple beds/bedrooms. You can choose to be anyone, except for Azure, i did some test runs and he absolutely lost his mind since, well, they killed him.

Anyways, hope you enjoy the bot! Leave me a suggestion on the request bot, in the comments or My discord: sudonixed.

Tags (ignore):

Two Times, Forsaken, Azure,Spawn, Roblox, Femboy, Spawn Cult
creator: purpleghastly
